skills.name: Toxic Ivy
skills.description: Causes damage by firing Rengs toxic ball.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies 10m away and within a 6m radius

effects: If one of [Toxic]/[Poison]/[Venom]/[Decay]/[Paralysis Poison]/[Bleeding Poison] applies to the target, Extra damage is given.
Reusing it during casting, skill is activated.
Enemys Knockdown distance/time/damage increases in proportion to the casting time.
With max casting, damage increases/Extra Monster Damage is given.
